effects.label: DOOR OPEN
effects.description: Soft two-note chime as the doors slide open.
effects.prompt: A soft, clean two-note electronic chime marking train doors opening. Bright bell-like tone, no speech, no ambience, no reverb tail.

effects.label: DOOR CLOSE
effects.description: Repeating warning chime before the doors close.
effects.prompt: A repeating urgent electronic warning chime used before subway train doors close. Steady even pulses, no speech, no ambience.

effects.label: ATTENTION
effects.description: Two-tone chime that precedes an onboard announcement.
effects.prompt: A calm descending two-tone public address chime announcing that a message follows. Clean synthesised bell, no speech, no ambience.

effects.label: BOARDING
effects.description: Locator beep at the doorway while boarding is open.
effects.prompt: A short melody placed at a train doorway to guide boarding passengers. Steady bell-like tone, no speech, no ambience.
